Run the following commands and report results. DO NOT modify any files.
1. `ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_api.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/ref_resolution.py src/erk/core/context.py` 2. `ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_api.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/ref_resolution.py src/erk/core/context.py` 3. `ruff check tests/unit/cli/commands/test_one_shot_api.py tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_outside_repo.py` 4. `ruff format --check tests/unit/cli/commands/test_one_shot_api.py tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_outside_repo.py`
Report all errors.

## Summary
ruff check: FAILED - 5 errors found ruff format: FAILED - 3 files would be reformatted
### Detailed Errors
**Linting Errors (ruff check):**

2. **tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_outside_repo.py:30** - F841: Local variable `params` is assigned but never used - Fixable with `--fix`
